name: education_school_district_s_new_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: A ransomware event locked report cards; seniors need transcripts for scholarship deadlines this week. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education school district new stonehaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Mensah
agents.identity: I am Mei Mensah, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Navarro
agents.identity: I am Gideon Navarro, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Mensah must choose under care versus fairness. What does Mei Mensah do?
